title: juniperus oxycedrus var. globosa
intro: Juniperus oxycedrus var. globosa, also known as the Greek juniper or prickly juniper, is a variety of juniper tree that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of juniperus oxycedrus var. globosa include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Juniper berries, the fruit of the plant, can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness the plant's medicinal properties.
